summary: P2: Contract Operating System v1 testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical features verified. Contract CRUD, appendices (7 types), legal modules (6), evidence package, send with magic link, contract number format CTR-2026-XXXX all working correctly.

issues: Minor: CORS warning for ipapi.co (non-blocking, geo-location feature)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Contract number format CTR-YYYY-XXXX implemented correctly
✅ Auto-calculation from tier (starter: 11,976 EUR, growth: 31,176 EUR)
✅ All 7 appendix types supported: ai_agents, website, seo, app, ai_addon, bundle, custom
✅ All 6 legal modules initialized: agb, datenschutz, ki_hinweise, zahlungsbedingungen (required), sla, auftragsverarbeitung (optional)
✅ Version increment on status change working
✅ Send contract with magic link working
✅ Customer endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
✅ Admin UI: Verträge nav item, contract list table, contract detail view all present
✅ Admin UI: Add appendix form, status select, send button all functional
seed_data_creation: Test contracts created with prefix 'TEST_' for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Contract OS v1 fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH contracts, appendices CRUD (7 types), send with magic link, evidence package, customer endpoints (auth required). Frontend: Verträge nav, contract list table with all columns (Nr, Kunde, Tarif, Typ, Status, Version, Erstellt), contract detail with calculation, appendices, legal modules (6), evidence, send button. Contract types: standard, individual, amendment. Legal modules: 4 required (agb, datenschutz, ki_hinweise, zahlungsbedingungen), 2 optional (sla, auftragsverarbeitung).

backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/contracts: ✅ Create contract with auto-calculation from tier
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/contracts/{id}: ✅ Contract detail with appendices, evidence, legal modules, hash
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/contracts/{id}/send: ✅ Send to customer with magic link

frontend_ui.Verträge nav item: ✅ Visible and navigable in admin sidebar
frontend_ui.Contract list table: ✅ Shows Nr, Kunde, Tarif, Typ, Status, Version, Erstellt columns
frontend_ui.Create contract button: ✅ Opens form with email, name, company, tier, type fields
frontend_ui.Contract detail view: ✅ Shows calculation, appendices, legal modules, evidence, hash
frontend_ui.Add appendix form: ✅ Opens with type select, title, description, pricing fields

evidence_package.fields: ✅ evidence_id, contract_id, action, timestamp, ip_address, user_agent, document_hash, contract_version, consent_status, legal_modules_accepted, signature_type, signature_data

mocked_apis.DeepSeek LLM: MOCKED via Emergent GPT-5.2 temporary provider
mocked_apis.Resend email: May not be configured (email sending may fail silently)
